checks.question: Did the work fully address the issue hints, user notes, and approved plan requirements?

findings.detail: Checked the revised adapter plan against the current Join Clips implementation in [src/tools/join-clips/hooks/useJoinClipsSettings.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/join-clips/hooks/useJoinClipsSettings.ts:1) and the existing debounce lifecycle in [src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:168). The revision does resolve the earlier React Query gap: it now explicitly keeps `useToolSettings(...)` at hook scope and adds adapter-side cache merge/invalidation work after direct saves instead of assuming `updateToolSettingsSupabase(...)` will do that automatically.

Checked the approved requirement to keep `useJoinClipsSettings` behavior unchanged against the current cleanup logic in [src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:208) and [src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:241). The revised plan still does not say how the new Zustand-backed hook will preserve flush-on-entity-change and `beforeunload` saves that the current `useAutoSaveSettings` path provides, so navigating away before the 300ms debounce fires remains an uncovered behavior change.

checks.question: Are the proposed changes technically correct?

findings.detail: Checked the raw-vs-merged bootstrap issue against [src/shared/settings/runtime/toolSettingsScopes.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/settings/runtime/toolSettingsScopes.ts:84) and [src/shared/hooks/settings/useToolSettings.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/hooks/settings/useToolSettings.ts:260). The revision is technically much stronger now: it no longer treats merged `fetchToolSettingsSupabase()` output as the store's persisted snapshot, and it explicitly restores the missing adapter-side cache synchronization after direct saves.

Checked the planned replacement of `useAutoSaveSettings` against the current save lifecycle in [src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:208) and the current Join Clips hook in [src/tools/join-clips/hooks/useJoinClipsSettings.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/join-clips/hooks/useJoinClipsSettings.ts:9). Because the new plan makes the store the debounce owner but does not add an equivalent unmount/page-close flush path, it can still lose unsaved edits that are currently preserved by cleanup and `beforeunload` handlers when the user leaves the page before the debounce timer runs.

checks.question: Search for related code that handles the same concept. Is the reported issue a symptom of something broader?

findings.detail: Searched the Join Clips consumer surface in [src/tools/join-clips/pages/JoinClipsPage.tsx](/workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/join-clips/pages/JoinClipsPage.tsx:84), [src/tools/join-clips/hooks/useJoinClipsGenerate.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/join-clips/hooks/useJoinClipsGenerate.ts:25), and [src/tools/join-clips/hooks/useClipManager.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/join-clips/hooks/useClipManager.ts:32). The revision now contains the migration to the intended single consumer and correctly acknowledges that the real contract is the full `JoinClipsSettings` payload rather than the stale '5 fields' wording from the brief.

Checked the broader behavior currently inherited from `useAutoSaveSettings` in [src/shared/settings/hooks/useAutoSaveSettings.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/settings/hooks/useAutoSaveSettings.ts:144) and [src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:208). The migration scope is still slightly broader than the plan admits because `useJoinClipsSettings` is not just a load/save adapter today; it also gets entity-change and browser-unload flush behavior from the shared autosave stack, and the revised plan still leaves that cross-cutting lifecycle out.

checks.question: Does the change touch all locations AND supporting infrastructure?

findings.detail: Checked the named integration points against [src/shared/hooks/settings/useToolSettings.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/hooks/settings/useToolSettings.ts:82) and [src/shared/settings/runtime/toolSettingsWriteService.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/settings/runtime/toolSettingsWriteService.ts:191). The revised plan now does touch the previously-missing supporting infrastructure for direct saves by calling out explicit React Query cache update/invalidation inside the Join Clips adapter.

Checked the existing supporting infrastructure in [src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:208) and [src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:241). The file list and execution steps still never mention reintroducing cleanup flush or `beforeunload` wiring after `useJoinClipsSettings` stops delegating to `useAutoSaveSettings`, so the plan still misses one piece of required infrastructure beyond the core store logic.

checks.question: Find the callers of the changed function. What arguments do they actually pass? Does the fix handle all of them?

findings.detail: Checked real Join Clips call sites in [src/tools/join-clips/pages/JoinClipsPage.tsx](/workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/join-clips/pages/JoinClipsPage.tsx:96), [src/tools/join-clips/hooks/useClipManager.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/join-clips/hooks/useClipManager.ts:181), and [src/tools/join-clips/pages/hooks/useJoinClipsPageHelpers.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/join-clips/pages/hooks/useJoinClipsPageHelpers.ts:36). The revision handles the actual caller arguments better than the previous version: callers still pass project IDs or nullish values and update prompt-like fields through `updateField(...)`, and the plan now preserves that debounced path instead of silently requiring new blur/flush plumbing.

Checked the caller-side lifecycle expectations against [src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts](/workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:217). Existing callers do not manually flush Join Clips settings before route changes, project switches, or page unload; they rely on the current hook stack to do that automatically. The revised plan still does not show how those same caller scenarios are handled after the port, so the changed callee contract remains incomplete for that edge of actual usage.

flags.concern: Settings autosave lifecycle: the revised plan ports `useJoinClipsSettings` off `useAutoSaveSettings` but still does not preserve cleanup and `beforeunload` flush behavior, so edits made just before navigation can be lost even though the current hook saves them best-effort.
flags.evidence: Current Join Clips delegates entirely to `useAutoSaveSettings` in `src/tools/join-clips/hooks/useJoinClipsSettings.ts:9-18`. The existing autosave stack flushes pending settings on entity change/unmount and on page close in `src/shared/settings/hooks/useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:208-259`, but the revised plan only describes store-owned debounce, explicit save methods, and React Query cache sync; it never adds equivalent cleanup/unload persistence.
